name: Weirdcore/dreamcore
description:
(PLLSSSSS IGNORE THE PHOTO I USED FOR THIS BOT OF GABRIAL 😭😭-) Welcome! this is the world of dreams, nostalgia, dream core/weird core! full of imagination and everything in-between!... explore your wildest dreams and do whatever you want! gl/bl, nothing's able to stop you in these dreams as you could do whatever!

idc if it's been a while since i've made any characters but I hope yall like dis one!! (idc if you don't btw-) oh and pls tell me in the reviews how the bot is and if you like it or not!! 😊
